definicao: CREATE TRIGGER trg_event_log_cliente_cadencia AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.cliente_cadencia FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_log_event_changes()
CREATE TRIGGER set_user_tracking_trigger BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_user_tracking()

CREATE TRIGGER trg_cancel_pending_links_on_payment AFTER UPDATE OF pagamento_feito ON public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((new.pagamento_feito = true) AND ((old.pagamento_feito IS NULL) OR (old.pagamento_feito = false)))) EXECUTE FUNCTION cancel_pending_links_on_payment()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_guard_recent_payment_dashboard BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION guard_recent_payment_dashboard()

CREATE TRIGGER cancel_links_on_regua_valor_update AFTER UPDATE OF regua, valor_inadimplente ON public.clientes_cobranca_setembro FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((old.regua IS DISTINCT FROM new.regua) OR (old.valor_inadimplente IS DISTINCT FROM new.valor_inadimplente))) EXECUTE FUNCTION supabase_functions.http_request('https://ubwcxktaruxqacxltovq.supabase.co/functions/v1/cancel-payment-links', 'POST', '{"Content-type":"application/json"}', '{}', '5000')

CREATE TRIGGER mirror_disparo_fields AFTER UPDATE ON public.clientes_cobranca_setembro FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((old.disparos IS DISTINCT FROM new.disparos) OR (old.disparos_equipe IS DISTINCT FROM new.disparos_equipe) OR (old."disparado com sucesso" IS DISTINCT FROM new."disparado com sucesso") OR (old.data_ultimo_disparo IS DISTINCT FROM new.data_ultimo_disparo) OR (old.status IS DISTINCT FROM new.status) OR (old.cadence_fase IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_fase) OR (old.cadence_dia_ciclo IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_dia_ciclo) OR (old.cadence_slot IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_slot) OR (old.cadence_variante IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_variante) OR (old.cadence_proximo_envio_at IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_proximo_envio_at) OR (old.cadence_ultimo_template IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_ultimo_template) OR (old.cadence_branch_state IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_branch_state) OR (old.cadence_entrou_em IS DISTINCT FROM new.cadence_entrou_em) OR (old.regua_at_entry IS DISTINCT FROM new.regua_at_entry) OR (old.last_inbound_at IS DISTINCT FROM new.last_inbound_at) OR (old.slots_enviados_hoje IS DISTINCT FROM new.slots_enviados_hoje) OR (old.slots_enviados_hoje_data IS DISTINCT FROM new.slots_enviados_hoje_data) OR (old.last_resgate_ia_at IS DISTINCT FROM new.last_resgate_ia_at))) EXECUTE FUNCTION mirror_disparo_fields_to_dashboard()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_guard_recent_payment_setembro BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.clientes_cobranca_setembro FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION guard_recent_payment_setembro()

CREATE TRIGGER trg_motor_v2_bloqueio_cliente AFTER UPDATE OF bloqueio_disparos, disparos_pausados_ate ON public.clientes_cobranca_setembro FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((new.bloqueio_disparos IS DISTINCT FROM old.bloqueio_disparos) OR (new.disparos_pausados_ate IS DISTINCT FROM old.disparos_pausados_ate))) EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_motor_v2_bloqueio_cliente()

CREATE TRIGGER trg_chat_log_transition AFTER UPDATE ON public.conversations FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((old.routing IS DISTINCT FROM new.routing) OR (old.status IS DISTINCT FROM new.status) OR (old.assigned_operator_id IS DISTINCT FROM new.assigned_operator_id))) EXECUTE FUNCTION chat_log_conversation_transition()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_chat_notify_handoff AFTER UPDATE OF routing ON public.conversations FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION chat_notify_handoff()

CREATE TRIGGER trg_chat_stamp_transition BEFORE UPDATE ON public.conversations FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((old.routing IS DISTINCT FROM new.routing) OR (old.status IS DISTINCT FROM new.status) OR (old.assigned_operator_id IS DISTINCT FROM new.assigned_operator_id))) EXECUTE FUNCTION chat_stamp_conversation_transition()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_event_log_disparos_log AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.disparos_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_log_event_changes()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_event_log_fila_humana AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.fila_humana FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_log_event_changes()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_event_log_gate_state AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.gate_state FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_log_event_changes()
CREATE TRIGGER update_links_pagamentos_gerados_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.links_pagamentos_gerados FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_data_ultimo_disparo AFTER INSERT ON public.message_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_data_ultimo_disparo_from_message_log()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_chat_bump_window AFTER INSERT ON public.messages FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION chat_bump_conversation_window()
CREATE TRIGGER update_pagamentos_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.pagamentos FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_orphan_email AFTER INSERT ON public.pagamentos_orfaos FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_orphan_payment_created()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_motor_v2_gate_from_phone_health AFTER INSERT ON public.phone_health FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_motor_v2_recalc_gate_from_health()
CREATE TRIGGER update_profiles_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_sales_leads_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.sales_leads FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_units_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.units FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_user_unit_permissions_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.user_unit_permissions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_motor_v2_gate_from_waba_health AFTER INSERT ON public.waba_health FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_motor_v2_recalc_gate_from_health()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_motor_v2_gate_from_waba_violations AFTER INSERT ON public.waba_violations FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_motor_v2_recalc_gate_from_health()
CREATE TRIGGER update_webhook_configs_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.webhook_configs FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
